full_text:
Zhang Gang (Wenji) 張綱 (文紀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Gang (張綱), styledWenji (文紀). Great-grandfather of Zhang Yi (Bogong), who served Shu. Zhang Gang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
